component.name: TSE Analytics
component.summary: Analyze PhenoMaster, IntelliCage and IntelliMaze experimental data

description.p: TSE Analytics is a desktop application for analyzing data from TSE Systems experimental platforms — PhenoMaster, IntelliCage and IntelliMaze.
It provides data import, an interactive analysis toolbox (histograms, ANOVA, PCA, regression, time-series and chronobiology tools, and more), and a node-based visual data-processing pipeline.
